title: Niels Abildskov
text: Home * People * Niels Abildskov Niels Abildskov [1] Niels Abildskov , a Danish computer scientits with interests in computer chess programming. He is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engines Copper [2] and Loki . Copper, his first chess engine trial was heavily influenced by Vice , is actually buggy and superseded by Loki [3] .
